column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a warm drink with both hands" | TEXT="お疲れ様です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking concerned with a hand to her cheek" | TEXT="ご無理なさらず" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a small sweet on a plate" | TEXT="甘いものでもいかが？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping sweat with a decorative handkerchief" | TEXT="頑張りすぎですよ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Patting a shoulder gently with a soft smile" | TEXT="お力になりますわ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Listening intently with a sympathetic gaze" | TEXT="お察しいたします" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing a cozy futon or cushion" | TEXT="ゆっくりお休みください" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Lighting a lantern to guide the way" | TEXT="足元にお気をつけて" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling warmly with autumn leaves falling" | TEXT="いつも見ておりますわ"
